title: ritchiea afzelii
intro: Ritchiea afzelii, also known as African or American Ritchiea, is a plant species in the family Celastraceae. It is native to tropical Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. Ritchiea afzelii has been used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, offering health benefits such as pain relief and wound healing. The herbal preparations of Ritchiea afzelii include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to support immune function and alleviate symptoms of various diseases.
